title: OpenAI 的 Sam Altman 宣布五角大楼达成“技术保障”协​​议
content: OpenAI 的首席执行官声称，其新的防御合同包括解决与 Anthropic 引发的相同问题的保护措施。
original_title: OpenAI’s Sam Altman announces Pentagon deal with ‘technical safeguards’
original_content: OpenAI's CEO claims its new defense contract includes protections addressing the same issues that became a flashpoint for Anthropic.

title: 特朗普采取行动禁止美国政府使用人类
content: 在国防部向 Anthropic 施压，要求其放弃对其人工智能如何被军队使用的限制之后，唐纳德·特朗普总统突然下达了命令。
original_title: Trump Moves to Ban Anthropic From the US Government
original_content: President Donald Trump’s sudden order comes after the Defense Department pressured Anthropic to drop restrictions on how its AI can be used by the military.

title: 亲身体验 Nano Banana 2，Google 人工智能图像生成器的最新版本
content: 谷歌最新的图像模型 Nano Banana 2 是一款强大的 AI 照片编辑器，可以刺破现实。嗯，有时候。
original_title: Hands-On With Nano Banana 2, the Latest Version of Google’s AI Image Generator
original_content: Google’s latest image model, Nano Banana 2, is a powerful AI photo editor that punctures reality. Well, sometimes.

title: 谁在真正运行人工智能？与亚历克斯·博雷斯 (Alex Bores) 展开数十亿美元的监管之战

title: 该公司声称在电池方面取得了突破。现在他们需要证明这一点。
content: 当一家公司声称已经创造了电池的圣杯时，肯定会出现一些问题。自从芬兰公司 Donut Lab 上个月宣布拥有一种新的固态电池技术，该技术已准备好大规模生产以来，人们的兴趣一直在升温
original_title: This company claims a battery breakthrough. Now they need to prove it.
original_content: When a company claims to have created what’s essentially the holy grail of batteries, there are bound to be some questions.
